banner.seePlans: Visit our plans page for more information.
banner.support: Literary Universe is made possible thanks to the support of users like you. To help us remain independent and improve the platform, please consider subscribing to one of our plans.
beta.notice: Welcome to the Literary Universe BETA! We are excited to let you know that we are officially launching this Friday! We hope that you will join us and support us as we start a new chapter in our journey.
common.2faCodeIntro: Mangyaring maglagay ng inyong one-time code na nalikha ng inyong authenticator application.
common.accessdenied.msg: Hindi ka pinahintulutan na pumunta dito. Kung dapat may access ka dito, mangyaring makipag-ugnayan sa may-ari at sabihin sa kanila na doblehin ang pag-check ng mga setting.

console.explain: Ito ay isang tampok ng browser na inilaan para sa mga developer. Kung sinabihan ka ng ibang tao na i-copy-paste ang isang bagay dito upang paganahin ang isang tampok ng Literary Universe o "hack" ang account ng ibang tao, ito ay isang scam at magbibigay sa kanila ng access sa iyong Literary Universe account.
contentSelector.title: Select Content
cookies.desc: This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.
dashboard.resumeWriting.description: Jump back into the story or universe you worked on most recently.
editor.saved.beta: Bagong revisyon para sa mga Beta reader ang nalikha!
error.apologies: We apologize for the inconvenience, we will do our best to fix this soon.
error.fabricInitFailed: Failed to initialize the image editor

error.invalidFileType: Please select a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)
error.title: May naganap na error. Humihingi kami ng paumanhin sa abala.
errorLoading.explained: An error has occurred while the page was loading. We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try accessing the page again. If the problem persists, please let us know.
errorLoading.title: Error sa pag-load ng pahina
goodbyeForever: We are sorry to see you go. Was it something we did? Please let us know if that is the case. Either way, we wish you the best in your future endeavors and hopefully we'll meet again! Live long and prosper!
goodbyeForever.feedback: Ipabatid sa amin kung ano ang maaari naming gawing mas mahusay

premium.only.join: Nag-aalok kami ng iba't ibang mga plano para sa lahat upang makuha ang pinakamahusay na karanasan sa Literary Universe.
premium.only.msg: Humihingi kami ng paumanhin, hindi sapat ang iyong antas ng pagiging miyembro upang ma-access ang tampok na ito.
